ddl.value: ("opening_balance_minor" IS NULL AND "opening_balance_date" IS NULL) OR ("opening_balance_minor" IS NOT NULL AND "opening_balance_date" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: accounts_opening_balance_pair_check

ddl.value: ("foreign_amount_minor" IS NULL AND "foreign_currency_code" IS NULL) OR ("foreign_amount_minor" IS NOT NULL AND "foreign_currency_code" IS NOT NULL AND "foreign_currency_code" ~ '^[A-Z]{3}$')
ddl.name: transaction_postings_foreign_pair_check
